description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

June 16, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Tuesday, 10:00 a.m. Gather at the west parking lot of Hanno City Hall.

Hosted by the Hanno Walking Club, the "Sugo-Ashi Leisurely Walk June" event will take place. Two course options will be available depending on weather and participant numbers:

(1) Starting from City Hall, passing through Chikkanji Temple, Nionji Temple, and Hanno Riverbed, returning to City Hall via Higashi-Hanno Station (approximately 7 km, about 2 hours 30 minutes).

(2) Passing through areas in Hanno (Shimokaji, Futanayanagi, Kaji) and Iruma City (Shinko, Noda), returning by train from Joshi Station (approximately 7 km, about 2 hours 30 minutes).

Free to participate (insurance at your own cost).

What to bring: drink, rain gear, IC transit card, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one).

Join on the day by arriving by the start time—no advance registration needed.

To confirm cancellation due to weather, check the Hanno Walking Club website or contact Onda at 090-2205-8073 after 3:00 p.m. the day before.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/12785.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event: June 16, 2026 (Tuesday) – Sugo-Ashi Leisurely Walk June
